title: Alarmset Events
description: A set of alarms reporting telemetry data. [Alarmset Events Documentation](../docs/messages/alarmset.md#telemetry)

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp the telemetry event was generated

partial_update.description: Indicates if this is a partial update (only some alarms may be included)

alarms.description: Collection of alarm names, defining the representative alarm set for this device.
